user.title: FranklinWH Connection
user.description: Local Modbus reads data directly from your aGate (fast, no cloud dependency). Cloud API is needed only for mode switching.

modbus.title: Modbus TCP Connection
modbus.description: Enter the IP address of your FranklinWH aGate. Modbus TCP must be enabled (Franklin app → SPAN panel toggle).

cloud.title: Cloud API Credentials
cloud.description: Enter your FranklinWH account credentials (same as the mobile app).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to aGate — verify IP address and that Modbus is enabled
